description: Coding Agent with Agentic Loop, Full History Tracking & Transparent Frontend

userStories.title: Add agent_iterations database table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a database table to store every iteration of the agentic loop so that history is queryable, referenceable, and displayable.
acceptanceCriteria: New AgentIteration model in backend/app/models/ with fields: id (UUID), task_id (FK), action_id (FK), iteration_number (int, 1-based), loop_type (primary/retry), attempt_number (int, 0 for primary), reasoning (text), tool_calls (JSON array), outcome (continue/completed/failed/paused/user_redirected), error (text nullable), lessons_learned (text nullable), created_at (timestamp), duration_ms (int)
Table created via init_db alongside existing tables
Index on (task_id, iteration_number) for fast queries
Model imported and registered in backend/app/models/__init__.py
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add iterations API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API endpoint to fetch iteration history for a task so the frontend can display it.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /actions/{action_id}/tasks/{task_id}/iterations returns list of AgentIteration records ordered by iteration_number
Response includes all fields from the model as JSON
Returns empty list if no iterations exist for the task
Endpoint registered in tasks router
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Extend Task model with workspace fields
userStories.description: As a developer, I need workspace_path and workspace_branch fields on the Task model so coding tasks can track their git worktree.
acceptanceCriteria: Task model in backend/app/models/task.py has new nullable fields: workspace_path (string) and workspace_branch (string)
Fields included in Task API response schema
Existing tasks unaffected (fields default to None)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement git worktree manager service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a service that creates and manages git worktrees so coding tasks run in isolated workspaces.
acceptanceCriteria: New backend/app/services/worktree_manager.py with functions: create_worktree(task_id, repo_path) -> (worktree_path, branch_name), remove_worktree(worktree_path), list_worktrees(repo_path)
Worktrees created at {repo_path}/.workdeck/worktrees/{task_id}/ with branch workdeck/task-{task_id_short}
Uses subprocess to run git worktree add/remove commands
WORKDECK_REPO_PATH env var configures the target repository path
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement coding agent tool functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need standalone tool functions (read_file, write_file, edit_file, glob, grep, bash) that the coding agent will call, all sandboxed to a workspace directory.
acceptanceCriteria: New backend/app/services/agents/coding_tools.py with functions: read_file(path, workspace) -> str, write_file(path, content, workspace) -> str, edit_file(path, old_str, new_str, workspace) -> str (returns unified diff), glob_search(pattern, workspace) -> list[str], grep_search(pattern, workspace, glob_filter=None) -> list[dict], bash_run(command, workspace, timeout=120) -> dict(stdout, stderr, exit_code)
All path-accepting functions validate that resolved path is within workspace directory (raise error if escape attempted)
edit_file computes and returns a unified diff of the change
bash_run executes commands with cwd set to workspace directory
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement coding agent with agentic loop
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a coding agent that runs an LLM-driven agentic loop (plan, execute tools, evaluate, decide) inside a git worktree to solve programming tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: New backend/app/services/agents/coding_agent.py extending BaseAgent
execute() method: creates worktree via worktree_manager, runs agentic loop, cleans up on failure
Agentic loop: sends conversation history + tool definitions to LLM, executes returned tool calls, appends results, repeats until LLM returns done/fail or max_iterations (50) reached
Tool definitions provided to LLM as function schemas for: read_file, write_file, edit_file, glob, grep, bash
Each iteration creates an AgentIteration record in the database with reasoning, tool_calls (input+output+duration+success), and outcome
On completion: stores workspace_path and workspace_branch on Task, generates summary as TaskOutput
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Register coding agent type in registry and planner
userStories.description: As a user, I want the planner to assign coding agent type to programming tasks so they are handled by the coding agent.
acceptanceCriteria: coding agent registered in agent registry (backend/app/services/agents/registry.py) as a builtin agent
AgentDefinition seeded in database at startup with is_builtin=True, agent_type='coding'
Planner system prompt updated with coding agent description: use for tasks involving file creation/editing, code writing, debugging, testing, refactoring in a repository
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add iteration SSE events to event bus
userStories.description: As a developer, I need new SSE event types for iteration lifecycle so the frontend can display real-time agent activity.
acceptanceCriteria: New event types published via event_bus: iteration.started (task_id, iteration_number, loop_type, attempt_number), iteration.reasoning (task_id, iteration_number, reasoning), iteration.tool_call (task_id, iteration_number, tool, input_summary), iteration.tool_result (task_id, iteration_number, tool, output_summary, success, duration_ms), iteration.completed (task_id, iteration_number, outcome), iteration.file_diff (task_id, iteration_number, file_path, diff), iteration.terminal (task_id, iteration_number, command, stdout, stderr, exit_code)
Coding agent publishes these events during its agentic loop as they happen (not batched)
Events included in SSE stream at GET /actions/{id}/events
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add executor-level retry loop with history injection
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the executor to wrap every agent's execute() call in a retry loop so that on first failure, the agent is re-invoked with history of what failed.
acceptanceCriteria: In executor.py _run_task(), on agent failure: enter retry loop (up to max_retry_iterations, default 3)
Each retry re-calls agent.execute() with augmented prompt containing structured failure history: iteration N, tried X, failed because Y
AgentIteration records created for both primary attempt (attempt_number=0) and each retry (attempt_number=1,2,3) with loop_type='retry'
If all retries exhausted, mark task as failed with full iteration history preserved
Existing inline recovery sub-action code in executor.py removed and replaced by this mechanism
SSE events published: task.retry_loop.started, task.retry_loop.iteration, task.retry_loop.exhausted
All existing agents work without modification
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add pause/resume API endpoints for tasks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need backend endpoints to pause and resume a running task so users can intervene mid-execution.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /actions/{action_id}/tasks/{task_id}/pause sets a pause signal for the task (e.g., in-memory dict or DB flag)
POST /actions/{action_id}/tasks/{task_id}/resume clears the pause signal and accepts optional guidance text in request body
Coding agent checks pause signal between iterations; if paused, saves current state, sets task status to 'paused', and stops the loop
When resumed with guidance, guidance stored as AgentIteration record with outcome='user_guidance' and injected into next LLM call
SSE events: task.paused, task.resumed, task.user_guidance
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add coding agent completion artifacts
userStories.description: As a user, I want the coding agent to produce a git diff artifact and change summary when it completes so I can review the work.
acceptanceCriteria: On completion, coding agent generates unified diff of all changes on worktree branch via git diff HEAD~N or git diff main...branch
Diff stored as Artifact with type='file', mime_type='text/x-diff'
TaskOutput.text contains summary: files changed, tests status, branch name
Task output_summary shows: 'Modified N files on branch workdeck/task-{id}. Tests passing/failing.'
workspace_branch stored in Task metadata for user reference
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add AgentIteration TypeScript type and API hook
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I need TypeScript types and a React Query hook for fetching iteration history so UI components can consume iteration data.
acceptanceCriteria: AgentIteration type added to frontend/src/types/index.ts with all fields matching backend model
New hook useTaskIterations(actionId, taskId) in frontend/src/hooks/ that fetches GET /actions/{actionId}/tasks/{taskId}/iterations via React Query
Hook supports refetch interval (polling every 2s when task is running)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add iteration SSE events to Zustand store
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I need the Zustand store to handle iteration SSE events so iteration data updates in real time without polling.
acceptanceCriteria: useActionStore extended with: taskIterations (map of task_id -> AgentIteration[]), currentIteration (map of task_id -> {iteration_number, reasoning, tool, status})
useActionEvents hook handles new event types: iteration.started, iteration.reasoning, iteration.tool_call, iteration.tool_result, iteration.completed, iteration.file_diff, iteration.terminal
Events update taskIterations and currentIteration state in real time
Retry loop events (task.retry_loop.*) update a retryStatus map (task_id -> {attempt, max_attempts})
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build iteration summary panel on task card
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a curated summary of agent progress on each task card showing current iteration, latest action, and retry status.
acceptanceCriteria: New IterationSummary component rendered inside TaskCard when task has iterations
Shows: current status line (e.g., 'Iteration 3/50 - editing src/utils.ts' or 'Completed in 12 iterations')
Shows progress bar or iteration count indicator
Shows latest action one-liner (e.g., 'Ran tests - 3 passed, 1 failed')
When in retry loop: shows 'Retry 2/3 - trying alternative approach'
Reads from Zustand store (currentIteration and retryStatus)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build expandable iteration timeline component
userStories.description: As a user, I want an expandable timeline below the task summary showing every iteration with tool icons, one-line summaries, and success/fail badges.
acceptanceCriteria: New IterationTimeline component rendered below IterationSummary, collapsed by default with expand/collapse toggle
Each iteration row shows: #N, tool icon(s), one-line summary, success/fail badge (green check or red X), duration
Clicking a row expands it to show: full reasoning text, list of tool calls with inputs and outputs
Failed iterations highlighted with red left border, successful with green
Retry loop iterations visually grouped with 'Primary Attempt' and 'Retry Attempt N' section headers
Timeline auto-scrolls to latest iteration when task is running
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build file diff viewer component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see file changes as a visual diff when expanding an edit_file tool call in the iteration timeline.
acceptanceCriteria: New DiffViewer component that renders unified diff with syntax highlighting
Added lines shown in green background, removed lines in red background, context lines in gray
File path displayed as header above the diff
Rendered inside expanded iteration detail when tool is edit_file or write_file
Install and use a lightweight diff rendering library (react-diff-viewer-continued or diff2html)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build terminal output viewer component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see shell command output in a terminal-like display when expanding a bash tool call in the iteration timeline.
acceptanceCriteria: New TerminalViewer component with dark background, monospace font
Shows command as prompt line (e.g., '$ npm test')
stdout in white/light text, stderr in red/orange text
Exit code indicator: green checkmark for 0, red X for non-zero
Max-height container with scrollbar for long output
Rendered inside expanded iteration detail when tool is bash
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build pause/guidance UI on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want a pause button on running tasks and a guidance text input when paused so I can intervene and redirect the agent.
acceptanceCriteria: Pause button (icon) visible on task cards when task status is 'running'
Clicking Pause calls POST /actions/{actionId}/tasks/{taskId}/pause and UI updates to show 'paused' status
When paused, a text input area appears: 'Provide guidance to the agent...' with a Submit + Resume button
Submitting guidance calls POST /actions/{actionId}/tasks/{taskId}/resume with guidance text in body
A 'Redirect' option allows replacing the remaining plan with new instructions (same resume endpoint with redirect flag)
SSE events task.paused, task.resumed update task status in Zustand store
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add iteration history retention and cleanup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a background job that prunes old iteration records to prevent unbounded database growth.
acceptanceCriteria: Configurable retention via env var ITERATION_RETENTION_DAYS (default 30)
Cleanup function deletes AgentIteration records older than retention period for completed actions
Cleanup runs on server startup and every 24 hours via asyncio background task
Task, TaskOutput, and Artifact records are not affected by cleanup
Typecheck passes
